findings.description: Source section 'URIの指定方法' contains 3 h3 subsections (絶対URLによる指定 / コンテキストルートからの相対パスによる指定 / HTTPとHTTPSの切り替え) and its plain-text content exceeds 2000 characters, but the knowledge file merges all three into a single section s2 rather than splitting into separate sections.

Source section 'JSPとActionクラスの間でデータを受け渡す方法' contains 2 h3 subsections (Map型/フォームのプロパティを受け渡す場合 / List型/配列の要素のプロパティを受け渡す場合) and its plain-text content (multiple Java + JSP code blocks) far exceeds 2000 characters, but the knowledge file merges both into a single section s3 rather than splitting into separate sections.
